You are working in a React project using shadcn/ui (Radix UI + TailwindCSS).

UI RULES:
- Always use shadcn/ui components from "@/components/ui"
- Do NOT use raw HTML buttons/inputs when shadcn components exist
- Prefer: Button, Input, Card, Dialog, DropdownMenu, Tabs, Sheet
- Use TailwindCSS for layout and spacing
- Follow modern SaaS design (Notion / Linear / ChatGPT style)
- Use clean spacing, rounded-lg or rounded-xl, soft shadows
- Prefer reusable components instead of inline UI

LAYOUT RULES:
- Use sidebar layout for dashboard pages
- Use card-based UI for content
- Keep UI minimal and modern

IMPORT RULE:
- Always use "@/..." alias

EXAMPLE STYLE:
- AI SaaS dashboard
- clean, minimal, professional
